source: Riptide RIA synthesizer output (Briefing.remediation_plan), verbatim shape

actions.action: Update the provider registration SOP to reflect the revised CMS enrollment screening requirements
Enforce an idle session timeout of 15 minutes or less on the provider portal
Set audit log retention to at least 180 days with delivery to the SIEM
Verify encryption at rest is enabled for the patient records store with quarterly key rotation
Train intake and scheduling teams on the revised patient consent workflow
